# openclaude-mcp — LLM Index
# See llms-full.txt for complete documentation

## openclaude-mcp

MCP control plane for OpenClaude (Claude Code harness from the March 31 2026 npm leak)
running against local Ollama models. Zero cloud token cost. 24/7 on RTX 4090.

Full docs: llms-full.txt

## Ports
- 10932: FastMCP 3.2 SSE + REST bridge
- 10933: React webapp

## Tools (13)
- list_models — Ollama inventory with VRAM/speed/license
- set_default_model — change default model
- model_status — Ollama health + VRAM check
- start_session — launch openclaude subprocess in a directory
- send_prompt — send instruction to running session
- session_status — current output, status, elapsed
- list_sessions — all active sessions
- stop_session — terminate and clean up
- kairos_enable — start autoDream memory daemon
- kairos_disable — stop daemon
- kairos_log — get consolidation log
- ultraplan — Opus cloud planning → local execution (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY required)
- fleet_status — raw fleet summary (via FastMCPApp, also model-visible)

## FastMCPApp (Prefab UI)
- fleet_dashboard (@app.ui) — live dashboard, degrades to JSON if prefab-ui not installed

## Recommended models (RTX 4090)
- gemma4:26b-a4b — default, 3.8B active, 256K ctx, 80-100 tok/s
- qwen3.5:35b-a3b — fastest, 3B active, 112 tok/s
- gemma4:31b — max quality, 256K ctx, ~50 tok/s

## Start
D:\Dev\repos\openclaude-mcp\start.ps1
D:\Dev\repos\mcp-central-docs\starts\openclaude-mcp-start.bat
